channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: ChatGPT gets support for reminders and scheduled searches
item.description:
OpenAI has started rolling out a number of new features to ChatGPT, according to Techcrunch.
The big news is support for reminders; the feature allows users, for example, to ask ChatGPT to remind them when it’s time to renew an ID or passport.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Avery label maker confirms attack on its site, customer credit card info stolen
item.description: Avery was unknowingly hosting a credit card skimmer for half a year, exposing customer data to hackers.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Nvidia’s new next-gen GPU benchmarks cause concern among PC gamers, particularly with the RTX 5080 – but don’t panic yet
item.description: Not convinced RTX 5000 is a winner? Folks worried about a reliance on ‘fake frames’ may not be that impressed with these fresh benchmarks.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: ExpressVPN upgrades to post-quantum encryption NIST standards
item.description: Yet again, the VPN provider consolidates its commitment to future-proofing user data against the threats posed by quantum computing. Here's all you need to know.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: Network convergence will drive enterprise 6G wireless strategies
item.description: The traditional separation between Wi-Fi and cellular networks — a cornerstone of enterprise wireless planning — is facing fundamental challenges according to a new 6G vision statement released this week by the World Broadband Association, “It is important that the 6G era brings together cellular, W
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Singular Bank ficha a Rubén Andrés como director general de Tecnología y Operaciones
item.description: A menudo, a comienzos de año se producen cambios en las cúpulas directivas de las organizaciones, independientemente del sector de actividad, como seña del nuevo camino que se abre durante los próximos 365 días.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Google ups Workspace price, makes Gemini AI features available for free
item.description: Google will no longer charge Workspace customers an additional fee for Gemini, expanding access to generative AI (genAI) features in apps such as Gmail, Docs, and Sheets. At the same time, the company is increasing the price of Workspace subscriptions by a small amount.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Oscar-shortlisted short film Anuja is coming to Netflix, and its sneak peak has made me even more excited for the Oscar nominations
item.description: Netflix has acquired the streaming rights to the short film Anuja, which has been shortlisted for the 2025 Oscars.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: Misinformation about California fires is spreading like, well, wildfire
item.description: The internet has exploded with fake images of the Hollywood sign burning, conspiracy theories about satanic rituals, and misinformation about government property seizures.
item.dc:creator: Jason Henry, The Mercury News

item.title: AI deepfakes estimated to cause $40 billion in losses by 2027
item.description: Blackberry’s Global Threat Intelligence report reveals critical infrastructure and deepfake attacks are on the rise.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: HPE adelanta a Dell y Supermicro al sellar un acuerdo con X: servidores de IA por 1.000 millones de dólares
item.description: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) ha firmado un contrato superior a 1.000 millones de dólares para suministrar servidores de inteligencia artificial a X, la plataforma antes conocida como Twitter, según Bloomberg.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Taiwanese chipmaker TSMC posts 57% surge in profit thanks to the AI boom
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — Taiwan computer chip maker TSMC reported Thursday that its profit in the last quarter rose 57%, buoyed by the artificial intelligence boom. The world’s biggest semiconductor manufacturer reported a net profit of 374.7 billion new Taiwan dollars ($11.4 billion), higher than expected.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: With AGI looming, CIOs stay the course on AI partnerships
item.description: The gulf between AI innovation and enterprise use of the technology is widening but that should not impact the trajectory of CIOs’ enterprise AI strategies today, observers say.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Powerful Webb Telescope captures photos of one of the earliest supernova ever seen
item.description: The James Webb Space Telescope captured photos of one of the earliest supernovas ever seen using infrared technology, and creating a time lapse of the phenomena.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Stanford AI expert’s credibility shattered by fake, AI-created sources: judge
item.description: Hancock, a prolific, high-profile researcher whose work has received some $20 million in grant support over the past two decades, charged $600 an hour to prepare the testimony the judge tossed.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Baron, The Mercury News

item.title: Fox will stream next month's Super Bowl for free on Tubi
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fox will stream the Super Bowl on Tubi for the first time, giving streamers and cord cutters a chance to watch the big game on Feb. 9 for free. Tubi was acquired by Fox Corporation in 2020. It is a free, ad-supported streaming service.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Hinge Introduces AI-Powered Coaching Feature for Daters
item.description: Hinge, a popular dating app, is releasing a new feature that uses artificial intelligence to help users improve their profile prompt responses.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Biden's big semiconductor law will ramp up US chip production -- but at a high cost, report finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A sweeping 2022 law, touted by President Joe Biden as a way to revive U.S. manufacturing of semiconductors and reduce the country’s reliance on foreign-made computer chips, will “sharply increase production’’ of semiconductors in the United States.
item.dc:creator: PAUL WISEMAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Microsoft creates new internal unit for AI development
item.description: Microsoft is creating a new engineering group focused on artificial intelligence: Core AI — Platform and Tools. The group combines the company’s Developer Division with the AI Platforms work teams and some employees who previously reported to Microsoft’s CTO.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft adds ‘pay-as-you-go’ access for AI agents with M365 Copilot Chat
item.description: Microsoft has added a “pay-as-you-go” option to access AI agents alongside its free M365 Copilot Chat plan.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: New Brazil law restricts use of smartphones in elementary and high schools
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — Brazil's President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva on Monday signed a bill restricting the use of smartphones at school, following a global trend for such limitations. The move will impact students at elementary and high schools across the South American nation starting in February.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE and DIARLEI RODRIGUES, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: CISA publishes security goals for software development process, product design
item.description: The US Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has published IT sector-specific goals (IT SSGs) to protect against cyber threats, including 11 software development process goals and seven product design goals.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Britain's leader unveils AI strategy, including vow to rip up red tape hindering AI projects
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The British government pledged on Monday to rip up the red tape hindering construction of data centers that underpin artificial intelligence while promoting its “pro-innovation” approach to regulating the technology.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: For 2025, the return of IT efficiency and effectiveness
item.description: Current and former executives say the federal technology themes for 2025 will be similar to 2024 with the addition of efficiency and effectiveness. The post For 2025, the return of IT efficiency and effectiveness first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: IRS ‘prepared’ for 2025 filing season, but potential spending cuts loom for the agency
item.description: For the 2025 tax filing season, the IRS is expanding several modernization efforts. But potential budget cuts on the table could curtail those efforts. The post IRS ‘prepared’ for 2025 filing season, but potential spending cuts loom for the agency first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Drew Friedman, Federal News Network

item.title: Prime Video's use of AI, Next Gen Stats on NFL games is helping viewers understand the game better
item.description: CULVER CITY, Calif. (AP) — The Los Angeles Rams defense appeared to be content to drop back in coverage and prevent San Francisco’s Brock Purdy from completing a Hail Mary on the final play of their Thursday night game on Dec. 12. The broadcast on Amazon Prime Video saw it differently, though.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: From AI assistants to holographic displays, automakers showcase in-cabin experiences at CES
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Interior lighting aimed at reducing motion sickness. Shiny holographic dashboards displayed on windshields. And AI-powered voice assistants paired with infotainment systems to keep you company on long drives.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, ABC 4
